SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.ports

Class BrokerReceptionOutboundPort

java.lang.Object
java.rmi.server.RemoteObject
java.rmi.server.RemoteServer
java.rmi.server.UnicastRemoteObject
fr.sorbonne_u.components.AbstractPort
fr.sorbonne_u.components.ports.AbstractOutboundPort
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.ports.BrokerReceptionOutboundPort
All Implemented Interfaces:
fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.ComponentInterface, fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.OfferedCI, fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.RequiredCI, fr.sorbonne_u.components.ports.OutboundPortI, fr.sorbonne_u.components.ports.PortI, ReceivingCI, Serializable, Remote
public class BrokerReceptionOutboundPort extends fr.sorbonne_u.components.ports.AbstractOutboundPort implements ReceivingCI
Port outbound utilisé par le broker pour livrer un message à un client abonné via l'interface ReceivingCI.

Propriétaire : Broker (un port outbound par client enregistré, indexé dans Broker.receptionPortsOUT).

les exceptions techniques sont encapsulées dans RemoteException (la CI ne déclare que throws Exception).

See Also:

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    receive(String channel, MessageI message)
    receive message from channel; the call is executed asynchronously to free the client component thread as soon as the corresponding task is submitted to the receiver.
    void
    receive(String channel, MessageI[] messages)
    receive messages from channel; the call is executed asynchronously to free the client component thread as soon as the corresponding task is submitted to the receiver.

    • BrokerReceptionOutboundPort

  • Method Details

    • receive

      public void receive(String channel, MessageI message) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: ReceivingCI
      receive message from channel; the call is executed asynchronously to free the client component thread as soon as the corresponding task is submitted to the receiver.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    message != null
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Specified by:
      receive in interface ReceivingCI
      Parameters:
      channel - name of the channel from which messsage is received.
      message - message received by the component.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.
      See Also:
      • ReceivingCI.receive(String, MessageI)

    • receive

      public void receive(String channel, MessageI[] messages) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: ReceivingCI
      receive messages from channel; the call is executed asynchronously to free the client component thread as soon as the corresponding task is submitted to the receiver.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    messages != null && messages.size() > 0
 pre    Stream.of(messages).allMatch(m -> m != null)
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Specified by:
      receive in interface ReceivingCI
      Parameters:
      channel - name of the channel from which messsage is received.
      messages - array of messages received by the component.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.
      See Also:
      • ReceivingCI.receive(String, MessageI[])
